content.problemStatement:
In this task, you will write a program to update a box's dimensions using a structure and pass-by-reference.

---

**Expected Output:**
```default
Initial dimensions of the box:
Length: 10.00, Width: 5.00, Height: 8.00
Updated dimensions of the box:
Length: 20.00, Width: 10.00, Height: 15.00
```
